positive: A detailed, stylized representation of a mythical celestial creature, a 'Starlight Gryphon,' perched on an ancient stone archway. The Gryphon has iridescent, cosmic plumage shifting from deep sapphire to luminous gold, and sharp, elegant talons. It is set against a nebula backdrop filled with deep purples, teals, and magenta gas clouds. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, focusing on a strong, dramatic silhouette. Utilize strong backlighting from a distant stellar source to create high contrast and dramatic depth. The art style should be a fusion of highly detailed neo-mythological etching and vibrant digital watercolor, suitable for silkscreen printing. Minimalist composition, clean lines, vector illustration quality, dramatic pop art color palette.
negative: low quality, amateur, blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dissolved, bokeh, poor rendering, ugly, bokeh, grain, writing
